=====[[Trade]]d to the player===== After defeating Lt. Surge in a rematch, he will appear at [[Saffron City]]'s [[Magnet Train]] station, where he will offer to trade a [[Foreign Pokédex entry|foreign language]] {{p|Pikachu}} for the player's own Pikachu. {{Gen4ievent |pokemon=Pikachu |nick=Volty |gender=f |ndex=0025 |ball=Poké |type=Electric |ot={{color|0070f8|Surge}} |id=33038 |nature=Jolly |item=Yellow Shard |met=a link trade
